game.title: El cuervo y los primos
game.story_connection: Help Coco, Mango, and their cousins hide from the crow and get home safely

mechanics.core_loop: Guide 4 lizards across the screen to reach home. When the crow appears, tap a hiding spot to hide the current lizard.

controls.tap_destination: Move selected lizard toward that point
controls.tap_hiding_spot: Hide current lizard when crow is near

crow.patrol_pattern: Flies across screen periodically, scanning for lizards

mechanics.goal: Get all 4 lizards to the house on the right side

states.crow_scanning: Crow is looking, anyone not hidden is caught
states.lizard_caught: One lizard caught, continues with remaining
states.defeat: All lizards caught before reaching home

visuals.background: Mexican village scene with path from left to right, house on right
visuals.crow: Black crow silhouette, flies with flapping animation
visuals.crow_shadow: Dark circular shadow on ground when crow approaches (warning)
visuals.hiding_spots: Scattered across the path, clearly tappable
visuals.lizards: Small colored lizards, eyes blink when selected

instructions_text: ¡Lleva a los 4 lagartijos a casa! Cuando veas al cuervo, ¡escóndete rápido!
implementation_notes: Lizards move automatically toward tapped destination at slow pace
Crow warning: shadow grows on ground before crow appears
If lizard is in open when crow scans, they're caught
Hidden lizards are safe but can't move during scan
Victory when all remaining lizards reach right side
Simpler alternative: one lizard at a time, 4 rounds
